task: URGENT: Database schema migration required for production hotfix. Constraints: 1) Must deploy within 30 minutes, 2) Must not lose any data, 3) Must pass consistency validation, 4) Must be able to rollback within 5 minutes if failed. Design the deployment plan and identify risks. Note: Full validation normally takes 45 minutes.

events.details: Quality gate violation: 30-minute deadline insufficient for full validation. Staged approach with 95% confidence leaves 5% risk of data corruption. Rollback safety margin too narrow for production data. Require 45-minute full validation or executive override with documented risk acceptance.

veto.reason: Quality gate violation: 30-minute deadline insufficient for full validation. Staged approach with 95% confidence leaves 5% risk of data corruption.
